docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-13-2007, OFF CALENDAR

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF FITZPATRICK, HEATHER M.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FITZPATRICK, HEATHER M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERMANO, MARK $362.92 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $402.92, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO THE RETURN OF HER SECURITY DEPOSIT REDUCED BY HER SHARE OF UTILITY EXPENSES, BUT THAT THE DEPOSIT WAS PAID TO HER BY CO-TENANT MATT HALL, ACTING ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF.
